title: X Summary State
description: Scraped timeline snapshot. Feed lists hold ordered post hrefs; full post data (stats, author, timestamp, body, references, thread) lives in posts keyed by canonical href.

timestamp.description: ISO8601 time when this state snapshot was generated.

cutoffTimestamp.description: Absolute ISO8601 instant for the start of the collection window (not a duration or minute offset). First run: scrape time minus timeWindowMinutes. Incremental run: previous state timestamp.

posts.description: All scraped posts keyed by canonical href. following, forYouSuggestions, monitored, and post references/thread point into this map.

following.description: Ordered hrefs into posts for Following > Recent.

forYouSuggestions.description: Ordered hrefs into posts for For You suggestions.

monitored.description: Ordered hrefs into posts per monitored handle.

postHref.description: Canonical post URL; must exist as a key in posts.

resolvedLink.description: External URL after redirects, with page metadata.

post.description: Post payload in posts (key = canonical href). references and thread are href lists into posts.

timestamp.description: ISO8601 time when the post was published.

body.description: Post text as markdown. Omitted for reposts without custom text.

thread.description: Hrefs of ancestor posts in the same thread (root-first); keys in posts.

links.description: External links from the body, resolved with title and description.

references.description: Hrefs of quoted or referenced posts; keys in posts.
